FOLLOW_OUR_WRITERS.WRITER1_BIO: Senior brand strategy advisor with 12 years in MENA markets. Specializes in long-term brand architecture and competitive positioning.
FOLLOW_OUR_WRITERS.WRITER2_BIO: Creative director turned strategist. Believes the best briefs are those that make creatives uncomfortable in the best way possible.

FOLLOW_OUR_WRITERS.WRITER4_BIO: MarTech specialist with background in behavioral psychology. Writes at the intersection of AI, ethics, and human decision-making.
FOLLOW_OUR_WRITERS.WRITER5_BIO: Researcher and strategist. Obsessed with understanding why people buy — and more importantly, why they don't.
FOLLOW_OUR_WRITERS.WRITER6_BIO: Two-time founder. Now writes about the things business schools won't teach you.
